old_exact: , income, gains, social security benefits, workers' annuities compensation benefits,
new_exact: , annuities income, gains, social security benefits, workers' compensation benefits,
evidence: The PDF shows (lines 103-105, wrapped): 'trust income, annuities income, gains, social security benefits, workers' compensation benefits, unemployment insurance benefits'. The DB incorrectly merged these terms, creating (1) redundant 'income, income,' and (2) the nonsense phrase 'workers' annuities compensation benefits' instead of the separate terms 'annuities income' and 'workers' compensation benefits'. This is clearly an OCR/ingestion error where line breaks were not properly handled when multiple terms were reformatted.
note: This error appears in the quotation from N.D. Admin. Code § 75-02-04.1-01(4)(b), listing examples of gross income. The PDF shows 'annuities income' as a separate item from 'workers' compensation benefits', but the DB has corrupted this into a single malformed phrase. The change preserves all three terms correctly while maintaining exact byte count.
